title: Spectrophotometric Determination of Fe(II), Co(ll), Ru(III) and lr(III) with 5-Nitroso-2, 4,6 - Triaminopyrimidine
author: A. K. SINGH
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Chemistry Department, Delhi University, Delhi-110 007 and St. Stephen's College, Delhi-110 007 

 Manuscript received 13 November 1975; revised 17 March 1976; accepted 27 April 1976 

 A sensitive reagent 5-nitroso-2,4,6-triaminopyrimidine is proposed for spectrophoto metric determination of iron(II), cobalt(II), ruthenium(lll) and iridium(III). The optimum conditions for the determination have been established. The toleration limits of m my diverse ions, which can co-exist during the determinations are found.
